summary: The video captures a snowy urban street with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. Vehicles are seen moving steadily, maintaining their lanes. Snowbanks line the sides of the road, indicating winter conditions. Pedestrians can be observed walking along the sidewalks.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are traveling on a snowy urban street, including cars and buses, with snowbanks lining the sides of the road.

uncertainties: Exact positions and velocities of all vehicles are not fully discernible due to limited frame clarity.
Presence of additional pedestrians beyond those shown is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no visible collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions among the vehicles or pedestrians.
